account.title: Your CYNA area
account.addressesIntro: Manage your billing and shipping addresses.
account.deleteAddressConfirm: Are you sure you want to delete this address?
account.deletePaymentConfirm: Are you sure you want to delete this payment method?
account.ordersEmpty: You don't have any order yet.
account.addressesEmpty: You haven't saved any address yet.
account.paymentsNote: Demo: no real card data is stored. Only the last 4 digits and expiry are kept.
account.mailIntro: Connect a destination address and send a test email via Brevo.
account.ordersDownloadInvoiceError: Could not generate the invoice right now.
account.genericError: Something went wrong. Please try again.

security.title: Security & two-factor authentication
security.intro: Strengthen your CYNA account by enabling two-factor authentication.
security.emailDescription: Receive a random 6-digit code by email after your password is validated.
security.emailCodeSent: A 6-digit code has just been sent to your email address.
security.emailSendError: Unable to send the security code by email.
security.emailDisableError: Unable to disable email two-factor authentication.
security.loginAlertsDescription: Receive an email after every sign-in with the IP address, system, browser and time.
security.loginAlertsToggleLabel: Send a security email after every sign-in
security.loginAlertsTestError: Unable to send the test notification.
security.totpNotConfiguredCopy: Two-factor authentication is not yet configured. Enable it to generate 6-digit codes via Google Authenticator, Authy or Microsoft Authenticator.
security.totpScanInstruction: 1. Scan this QR Code with your authenticator app:
security.totpManualInstruction: Or enter the secret key manually:
security.totpConfirmInstruction: 2. Enter the 6-digit code generated by your app to confirm activation:
security.totpToggleLoginLabel: Require the 2FA security code at sign-in
security.totpToggleLoginEnabled: Two-factor authentication enabled for your next sign-ins.
security.totpToggleLoginDisabled: Two-factor authentication disabled at sign-in (your setup is preserved).
security.totpToggleLoginError: Unable to update the sign-in setting.
security.totpConfiguredCopy: Two-factor authentication is configured. You can test its synchronisation or choose to require it at sign-in.
security.totpDisableConfirm: Are you sure you want to disable and reset 2FA?
security.totpDisabled: Two-factor authentication has been disabled and reset.
security.totpTestInstruction: Enter the temporary code generated by your authenticator app to make sure it is correct:
security.totpTestError: Invalid code. Check your device's clock.
